name: Spinach (Marks)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse spinach leaves well and trim large stems.
2. In a large non-stick pan, heat sesame oil over medium heat.
3. Add garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
4. Add spinach leaves and cook, stirring occasionally, until wilted, about 5 minutes.
5. Remove from heat; stir in sesame seeds.
6. Serve warm or at room temperature.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 51
CHO: Omg
CAR: 5g
PRO: 4g
SOD: 80mg
FAT: 3g
